name: Organizing - TimKaine.com
subject: 100 DAYS OUT: Where things stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
We've opened offices, we've recruited volunteers, and we've talked to voters. But there is still a lot more of that to do. -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Election Day is only 100 days away! Make sure Tim and the rest of our team can run this race hard and finish strong: [Chip in now >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12d5/3e0906/6e2ffb81/3e3523c4/1385904336/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+nownbspgtgt&utm_campaign=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field&source=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field") | [**DONATE TO OUR
ON-THE-GROUND PROGRAM**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12d5/3e0906/6e2ffb81/3e3523db/1385904336/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-recurring-fund?refcode=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field&amount=25&recurring=4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+TO+OUR%0A%09%09%09%09%09ONTHEGROUNDnbspPROGRA&utm_campaign=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field&source=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field")
---
Derek,

With only 100 days left to go before the Election Day, we wanted to let you know what our team on the ground has been up to.

So far, we've:
* Opened more than 20 field offices all across the Commonwealth,
* Hired community organizers in every corner of Virginia to make it easier for folks to get engaged and stay involved,
* Recruited thousands of volunteers to support Democrats up and down the ticket,
* Talked to hundreds of thousands of voters about what's at stake in their neighborhoods and on the phones.

... and we're just getting started.

Over the next 100 days, our team is ready to work even harder - because we aren't taking anything for granted in this race. **Help make sure we have the resources to keep this team strong so Democrats can win big in exactly 100 days:[Chip in now >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12d5/3e0906/6e2ffb81/3e3523da/1385904336/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+nownbspgtgt&utm_campaign=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field&source=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We think it's important for you to know where your donations go. Your support opens community offices and gets volunteers trained and on the pavement.

Thanks for being a part of this team. Your donations so far have made this important work up to now possible - but there's still more work to do. [Help us hit our July goal so we can celebrate 100 more days of opening offices and supporting Virginians as they make their way to the ballot box on November 6th >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12d5/3e0906/6e2ffb81/3e3523dd/1385904336/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Help+us+hit+our+July+goal+so+we+can+cele&utm_campaign=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field&source=20180729_2_FR_TEAM_EOM-field")

Thanks,

_Team Kaine Organizing_

name: Tina Smith
subject: We can't be afraid to talk about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Let's be honest for a moment.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7aa/c1f7015/6ac42272/114275e1/2689121609/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180729_em-A") Friend, We can't be afraid of the issues that people might tell you aren't "good" issues or the "right" talking points. We must be perfectly clear about what's happening in this country. The Trump administration ripped children away from their mothers and fathers at our country's borders. They are doing everything to take away health care from thousands of Minnesotans. And they gave billion-dollar tax cuts to big corporations while throwing out crucial environmental protections. **This is an attempt to radically reshape our country in favor of those who have power against those who do not.** And they have done this with just two years of control of Congress and the White House. Can you imagine if we end up with two more years of Trump's agenda getting rubber-stamped by Republicans in Washington? **[Make a contribution of $5 now to my campaign so we have the resources to win this election and take back control of the U.S. Senate from the Republican Party. This seat will be critical in taking away the GOP's slim 51-49 majority.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7aa/c1f7015/6ac42272/114275e1/2689121609/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180729_em-A")** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7aa/c1f7015/6ac42272/114275e1/2689121609/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180729_em-A") I promise to keep fighting with everything I have for our values in the Senate, and I can't thank you enough for being in this fight with me. Tina | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help to hit her goal if she is going to win this tough race. ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7aa/c1f7015/6ac42272/114275e2/2689121609/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180729_em-A-biobox&amount=5&recurring=true")
---

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: Update for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
We have a big deadline coming up on Tuesday. So we're sending our most important supporters an update.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633841/1a8421e1/1a4c1b72a/4884d4fd/1853974558/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
_We have a big deadline coming up on Tuesday. So we 're sending our most important supporters an update:_ **Update for you:** July Deadline: Tuesday **Left to Raise: $3,201** [**Rush a donation to push us over the edge >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.29_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Trust us, team -- we wouldn't be emailing you if it weren't important. As you know, Tom is the MOST ENDANGERED Democrat in the ENTIRE HOUSE. The far-right wants nothing more than to unseat Tom so they can replace his independent voice with a rubber stamp for their unpopular, toxic agenda. And GOP special interest groups are lining up to help them, because AZ-01 is one of their blue-to-red pickup opportunities this year. **We can 't let the far-right defeat Tom, team. If they do, Arizona families will lose an independent voice fighting for them in Congress -- _and it will be harder for Democrats to take back the House!_** If we hit this goal on Tuesday, we can beat the far-right and keep AZ-01 blue. That's because winning this race is going to require serious resources to carry out our ambitious plans to communicate Tom's message to voters across our district. [**So, what do you say, will you rush a donation before our deadline?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.29_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.29_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

The far-right wants nothing more than to unseat Tom so they can replace his independent voice with a rubber stamp for their unpopular, toxic agenda. And GOP special interest groups are lining up to help them, because AZ-01 is one of their blue-to-red pickup opportunities this year. We can 't let the far-right defeat Tom, team. If they do, Arizona families will lose an independent voice fighting for them in Congress -- and it will be harder for Democrats to take back the House! If we hit this goal on Tuesday, we can beat the far-right and keep AZ-01 blue. That's because winning this race is going to require serious resources to carry out our ambitious plans to communicate Tom's message to voters across our district. "=" Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "="._ ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: Senator Nina Turner
subject: DNC convention to now: we've come a long way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
With your help, we are building a future that seems closer today than it did even two years ago--one that includes eliminating superdelegates and reforming the DNC, passing Medicare for All, a $15 liv
#
Friends,
On this day, exactly two years ago, I boarded a flight in Philadelphia heading back to Ohio. While the convention did not go as we had hoped, thanks to the Sanders delegates and those who supported his historic campaign, we were able to pass the most progressive platform in the history of the Democratic Party.
From the bold progressive vision Senator Sanders articulated, Our Revolution was born. A movement of millions who would not be bought by corporate interests. Who would represent every single person, including those who were being left behind: black and brown people, our LGBTQIA community, women, those struggling to make ends meet, families in every zip code, students, the sick, immigrants... all of us.
A lot has happened over the two years since then, but I'm far from giving up hope. In fact, the energy and resolve I see as Our Revolution members mobilize to reform the Democratic Party and support a new generation of progressive candidates are absolutely inspiring.
**[With just 100 days until Election Day, can you help make Our Revolution stronger than ever? If you can give $5- or whatever you can afford today - on a regular monthly basis, we can make sure these our new progressive candidates have the resources they need to win.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9d0/bed43eb/7fc05c89/75fd654f/3697916777/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiMTgwNzI5LWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july18-recur?refcode=180729-full&recurring=yes")**
With your help, we are building a future that seems closer today than it did even two years ago - one that includes eliminating superdelegates and reforming the DNC, passing Medicare for All, a $15 liveable minimum wage, free college, social justice, and immigration reform. And the people speaking the loudest for these values are those candidates running grassroots campaigns that aren't corrupted by greed or controlled by the top 1 percent.
**Our dream of an economy that benefits everyone is being made a reality by people like you, stepping up to make sure that a new generation of candidates who don 't do politics as usual have the resources they need to win.**
**[That's why I'm asking: Can you pitch in and become a core supporter of Our Revolution, giving $5 every month so we can champion candidates who are fighting for our values? ](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9d0/bed43eb/7fc05c89/75fd654f/3697916777/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiMTgwNzI5LWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july18-recur?refcode=180729-full&recurring=yes")**
Together, we are changing politics as usual.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[Contribute](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9d0/bed43eb/7fc05c89/75fd654f/3697916777/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiMTgwNzI5LWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july18-recur?refcode=180729-full&recurring=yes")**

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9d0/bed43eb/7fc05c89/75fd6549/3697916777/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9d0/bed43eb/7fc05c89/75fd654b/3697916777/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Real jobs for Floridians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/UToDWdFqqGQ7PjwcfsFZK-VLiA6Fy1pVDcM-IUu7xFo=/UyEPIA4-JCMwbYfW-fUQCUd3TjZDS73SzPfcSjEpyII=) Friends and Neighbors -- All too often, Floridians leave our state after achieving their education or getting to a certain point in their career. This is not because they no longer love this beautiful place we call home, but because they cannot find a job in their field - or sometimes at all - that can compete with wages offered other states. Not only does this uproot these individuals and their families, **it takes very valuable players out of our local and statewide job markets. ** **But it doesn 't have to be that way -- Innovation can create real long-term high-paying jobs for Floridians. And that's not just some talking point, because programs that I have started have created an economic impact of over $1 BILLION for the state. ** During my ten years in the Florida Senate, I helped to lay the foundation for an innovation economy by creating and fostering initiatives such as the Florida Institute of Commercialization, which helps entrepreneurs with business fundamentals - i.e. writing business plans - and helps them to secure company funding to create the leading products and companies of tomorrow. The Chief Financial Officer (CFO) plays a very key role in how our job market and economy function - and how we can invest in innovative endeavors like entrepreneurship, **that can help it grow, to create real jobs and opportunities for Floridians. ** [Help Jeremy Get to the Cabinet. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/UToDWdFqqGQ7PjwcfsFZK-VLiA6Fy1pVDcM-IUu7xFo=/A97GBpl5ujOhxeHK1kVsfaMQblHS_SrxlogYFm0TJmw=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) That is one of the reasons why I decided to throw my hat in the "ring" for this race. As your next CFO, I would take my experience in the State Senate and in the business world with me to the Cabinet, to help build and invest in an innovation economy, one that will be a national standard. But I have to get there first. **And I can 't do it without your help**. **We have another crucial End-of-Month fundraising deadline coming up in just 48 hours.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more before midnight on Wednesday - and help me bring our innovative vision to the cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UToDWdFqqGQ7PjwcfsFZK-VLiA6Fy1pVDcM-IUu7xFo=/A97GBpl5ujOhxeHK1kVsfaMQblHS_SrxlogYFm0TJmw=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States

We’re now not only fighting against the Washington establishment, but also the radical Democrats bankrolling our opponents. Financial reports have exposed liberal billionaire George Soros maxing out his contributions to my far-left Democrat opponent Mike Espy, while California billionaire Sean Parker contributed $250,000 donation to fellow liberal Cindy Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC. Peter, We’re now not only fighting against the Washington establishment, but also the radical Democrats bankrolling our opponents. Financial reports have exposed liberal billionaire George Soros maxing out his contributions to my far-left Democrat opponent Mike Espy, while California billionaire Sean Parker contributed $250,000 donation to fellow liberal Cindy Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC. Soros and Parker were two of Hillary Clinton’s biggest donors, together donating millions of dollars to help her defeat President Trump in 2016. Now they’re trying to buy Mississippi’s election. Call me crazy, but I think this election should be decided by Mississippi voters -- not California Democrats. That’s why we’ve launched a Conservative Money Bomb -- we need to raise $25,000 by the end of the month to match some of the funds that radical out-of-state Democrats are funneling into our state to buy our election. Chip in today and fight back against the radical Democrats who are trying to silence our voice and buy our election! They both voted for Hillary Clinton, and are turning to liberal California billionaires to try and defeat a true conservative. Allow me to be very clear about this: liberals like Parker and Soros don’t care about Mississippi or our values. All they care about is defeating conservatives around the country. Help me fight back against this dirty money and show that Mississippi’s conservatives won’t accept a Senator who is bankrolled by far-left liberals. Chip in and support our campaign today. The people of Mississippi expect their leaders to stand up and fight back against those radical Democrats, not take money from them. Chip in to our Conservative Money Bomb today and show Cindy Hyde-Smith and Mike Espy that Mississippi wants a true conservative representing us, not someone bankrolled by west-coast billionaires! [Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d67a7d3b3d1b1ab49fdca43157f35af093588cefdf1718360f95d19f71b893ffac41df7b0818b34847192205efc38afe93cbf27b4246a4b8) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc15534996042feee6b8c2e91350fac703f6b524fd40d6ffe38888b65512d934302c7f742851e79943a5a0029d946c417c6c2f6a9dd6e0bcec) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c59c4eef22aeb078630d24953b074c2d1ecc1dd79cd60bfbb3aafb24cbc78c31ade871b784f342354)

clean_body: There are less than 100 days to go... | | | | | | | | Friend, Lara Trump -- who has done such an incredible job for our campaign -- emailed you. With less than 100 days until the election, we're executing a battle plan to elect more allies in the House and Senate that will fight for YOU. I will travel ANYWHERE I need to go to get real conservative fighters elected. I will do whatever it takes. I will work harder than ever before. Why? Because you deserve the ENTIRE agenda you voted for, Friend. | Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States \--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Lara Trump Subject: 100 To: | Friend, The midterm election is now only 100 DAYS away. The media will spend the day dreaming about how President Trump is going to lose his majority. We 're going to spend the day laying out our battle plan to elect more allies who will help President Trump drain the swamp. Will you stand on the frontlines of that fight? | No president has faced as much obstruction as President Trump. Whether it's the mainstream media or liberals in Washington who use the swamp to stay rich and powerful, President Trump has a long list of enemies that want to take him down. But that doesn't stop him from making trade deals that are fair to America, protecting American industries, cracking down on illegal immigration, securing your religious liberties, and fulfilling the promises he made to you. ...And yet, he's only getting started. Thank you, Lara Trump Senior Advisor Donald J. Trump for President, 2020 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: A resurgence that’s defying the critics
body:
| |
---
The White House • July 30, 2018
## The Day Ahead
• President Donald J. Trump welcomes Italian Prime Minister Giuseppe Conte to the White House. [Watch their joint press conference at 2:00 p.m. ET.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMwLjkzMTI0NzYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMC45MzEyNDc2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYxMjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **** • The President participates in the swearing-in ceremony for Robert Wilkie as America’s next Secretary of Veterans Affairs.
## **A resurgence that’s defying the critics**
**When President Trump took office** , 1.5 million fewer prime-age Americans were working than eight years earlier. Almost 200,000 manufacturing jobs had been lost under the previous administration. The left’s response to President Trump’s call to “Build American” was clear: Manufacturing jobs are obsolete. They’re not coming back. **As for a growing economy** , former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers spoke for many Democrats when he said that 3 percent annual growth was “fair enough if you believe in tooth-fairies.” **Flash-forward to Friday**. “I am thrilled to announce that, in the second quarter of this year, the United States economy grew at the amazing rate of 4.1 percent,” [the President announced](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMwLjkzMTI0NzYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMC45MzEyNDc2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYxMjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/remarks-president-trump-economy/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) from the South Lawn. Real GDP is on track for better than 3 percent growth for the first time since 2005\. **To put that in perspective** , during the entire period from 2001 to 2016, the annualized rate of real GDP growth in the first half of the year averaged just 1.9 percent. For every percentage point we go up, the result is roughly $3 trillion and 10 million jobs. [Get the facts: The Trump economy is growing to new heights](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMwLjkzMTI0NzYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMC45MzEyNDc2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYxMjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-economic-agenda-delivering-gdp-growth-dismissed-unrealistic/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Council of Economic Advisers** : [An economy firing on all cylinders ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMwLjkzMTI0NzYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMC45MzEyNDc2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYxMjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/economy-firing-cylinders/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# Strengthening American bonds with Europe
**Italy is an important ally** : a member of NATO, a crucial partner in Afghanistan and Iraq, and a key part of bringing stability to the Mediterranean. Today, President Trump and Italian Prime Minister Conte will meet in Washington, looking to deepen cooperation and promote economic prosperity on both sides of the Atlantic. **Today’s meeting comes on the heels** of last week’s major announcement on European trade. Alongside European Commission President Jean-Claude Juncker, President Trump outlined the four principles both sides have agreed will mark a new era in U.S.–European trade:
> 1\. Working toward zero tariffs, zero non-tariff barriers, and zero subsidies on non-automotive industrial goods
> 2\. Making it easier for the European Union to purchase liquefied natural gas
> 3\. Reducing trade and bureaucratic obstacles slash trade costs dramatically
> 4\. Joining forces to address unfair trade practices, e.g. intellectual property theft
[President Trump launches a new era of trade with Europe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMwLjkzMTI0NzYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMC45MzEyNDc2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYxMjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-launches-new-reciprocal-trade-relationship-european-union/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch** : [President Trump’s press conference with the European Commission President](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMwLjkzMTI0NzYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMC45MzEyNDc2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYxMjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ID6WeLDzZOc)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks on the 4.1% Q2 GDP growth** | July 27, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMwLjkzMTI0NzYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMC45MzEyNDc2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYxMjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMwLjkzMTI0NzYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMC45MzEyNDc2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYxMjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzMwLjkzMTI0NzYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDczMC45MzEyNDc2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYxMjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&http://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/new?preferences=true)
The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

name: Senator Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m all-in for Abigail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

What Abigail Spanberger is doing in Virginia right now is nothing short of remarkable.

In a year when Democrats across the country are running inspiring grassroots campaigns, **Abigail stands out.** She's exactly the kind of candidate we need to get behind right now -- because she's exactly the kind of leader we need more of in Washington.

She's smart and courageous, committed to service and willing to sacrifice -- values that will serve her well in Congress. That's why I hope you'll **[join me in supporting her candidacy.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJcy0Hi5xcLrLyqOw4uV3thSoKLhUMK7bQaHlxWsKCI=/aJctL1i4qY4sreHT2ETRN_FbTL8ONZcJ_7lCQrSfd7I=?refcode=warren072618)**

I know firsthand what it takes to unseat a well-funded Republican incumbent. And that's why we need to help Abigail build a grassroots organization like nothing the Virginia 7th has ever seen, so she can reach out to every voter and make sure **their voices are heard in November.**

And you can do your part right now, by **[donating to Team Spanberger today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJcy0Hi5xcLrLyqOw4uV3thSoKLhUMK7bQaHlxWsKCI=/aJctL1i4qY4sreHT2ETRN_FbTL8ONZcJ_7lCQrSfd7I=?refcode=warren072618)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJcy0Hi5xcLrLyqOw4uV3thSoKLhUMK7bQaHlxWsKCI=/aJctL1i4qY4sreHT2ETRN_FbTL8ONZcJ_7lCQrSfd7I=?refcode=warren072618)

After a lifetime spent serving our country, this is Abigail's first campaign. Already, she's won a huge primary victory, built a strong organization, and turned a historically safe Republican seat into a tight toss-up of a race.

There's still a long road left to victory, but I know we can get there, **especially with you** --with all of us--walking by her side.

Thank you.

Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJcy0Hi5xcLrLyqOw4uV3thSoKLhUMK7bQaHlxWsKCI=/nMMpBIYD-63DP-f_joM8wYRnwkqjS6ZqGe_JkUzD3fo=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/OJcy0Hi5xcLrLyqOw4uV3thSoKLhUMK7bQaHlxWsKCI=/iGW01P-bpIQ5G-DDtphKgO8EWP9Y8wx0hkkamVu_Wvo=)_

name: Peter Joffrion
subject: I need your help today
body:
---
Hello there,

The way to spark real change in communities is by getting involved.

I never expected to run for office, but when I saw no one stepped up to challenge Mo Brooks, I knew I had to join the race. My broad appeal and experience using creative ways to create jobs in the city of Huntsville gives me a leg up in this race.

When I’m out knocking on doors and meeting voters, they tell me they’re ready for a leader who will listen and go to work for them. I’ll do just that.

My opponent doesn’t think we can flip this seat, but the people of North Alabama are ready for change. It’s time we elect a representative for AL-05 who will fight for our communities in Washington, not just be a puppet for the president and other GOP leaders.

If you’re with me, I’d be obliged if you pitched in to help us crush our end of month deadline. We’re almost to our goal and whatever you can donate today will help us fuel our efforts and keep my team out in the field.

I can’t thank you enough for your support. Here’s the link to contribute: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterjoffrion4alabama](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1771337/9368913/172365608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDdjNGZiNy0xMTk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=68zjLFUpjBQ4fX9MR-yQfnJR0mBfy7m9moPZ4mKMr14=&refcode=20180730)

Thanks and talk soon, Peter
---

Peter Joffrion for Congress

Huntsville, AL 35804
United States

body:
| | |
---
Please take one minute to read this, team - it's critically important to Democrats' chances to take back the Senate this year.

After a recent poll came out showing Democrat Jacky Rosen **DOWN****one point** to GOP extremist Dean Heller, _POLITICO_ reported that **"Democrats have almost no shot at winning back the Senate majority if Jacky Rosen can't defeat Sen. Dean Heller in the fall."**

**So this couldn't have come at a better time: A group of donors just offered to DOUBLE every donation we receive ahead of our CRITICAL end-of-month deadline to win in Nevada so Democrats can take back the Senate and protect the future of the Supreme Court**. (Ready to take back the Senate? **[Please, click here right now to help us beat the GOP's candidate so Dems can regain Senate control.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1a6/4fbb2af3/7a5dbc78/5e8b52b0/3404948854/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg3OC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk878-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**)

This race could not be closer - so taking advantage of opportunities like this is our only chance to win. And with Super PACs linked to President Trump and Mitch McConnell ready to go all in to defeat Democrats like Jacky, we're counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us close the gap.

body:
Team, just making sure you saw Jessica's note from yesterday. We've come so far together already, but an onslaught is coming. With less than 100 days to go, we need your help to talk to voters and be ready to defend Jessica.
That means hitting our monthly fundraising goal before tomorrow's deadline--and not falling a cent short.
**We 're still $8,432 from hitting the amount we need to have in the bank by tomorrow night. Can you help us now with a donation of $25 or more? **
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_15&amount=15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_25&amount=25)

[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_250&amount=250) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_other)
Thank you,
Kim
Kim Howard
Campaign Manager
Morse for Congress

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Jessica Morse
On: Sun, Jul 29
Subject: 100 days to go
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_logo)
Peter,
It's been over 450 days since I first began my listening tour of the district. **And today we are 100 days from Election Day!**
We have 100 days to help the people of this district whose voices and needs are often overlooked. People like Jill in Murphys, who has a pre-existing condition and was deciding with her husband whether they could risk buying a home given the cost of her healthcare. Or Lauren in Sonora, working a full-time job and still living in a women's shelter with her children because she can't afford housing in her community. Or Monte in Auburn, who's taking care of his sick wife and providing for his adult kids while they look for jobs.
**We have 100 days left to help the people of our district --people like Jill, Lauren, and Monte, working hard to pay their bills and support their loved ones. We are on pace to win in November, but we have to maintain our momentum. Chip in now to help us hit our July fundraising goal by Tuesday at midnight: **
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_15&amount=15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_25&amount=25)
---|---
[$50 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_50&amount=50) | [$100 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_100&amount=100)
[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_250&amount=250) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_other)
**Because of your generous donations and support, we 've done what political pros said was impossible--we out-raised the incumbent four quarters in a row.** And our support is growing--just a few days ago, EMILY's List endorsed us. We can't back down now.
Tom McClintock will use every dirty political ploy in the book. He'll call on the Koch brothers to dump millions into negative attack ads that will try to manufacture ideological wedges between our neighbors. He'll perpetuate the old-school politics that make people cynical, angry, and disillusioned.
**Our campaign is different. With our focus on reaching our neighbors and finding solutions, we 've gained unprecedented momentum.** Scores of you are coming out to volunteer with us and talk neighbor-to-neighbor--dissolving the partisan gridlock one sincere conversation at a time. That's why I'm running for Congress--to be a partner and an advocate for our community, to listen to our neighbors and find solutions that last centuries, not political cycles.
We have 100 days left not just to change the party in power, but to change the entire political culture. [_**Thank you for your support and energy that has gotten us this far. Chip in today to give us the final boost across the finish line before Tuesday 's fundraising deadline.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/fQ8W1AsnSgb54q0iEwiXDYuNOo0Rsl6CvNg_9Em14ZE=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_l1)
Thank you,
Jessica

[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/mpcxYp5yp7POisKPyANlJDE50lHrpEr0oAe7xlGG4Tk=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180730_KH_juleom4_all_contribbutton)
---

Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign.
---
Jessica Morse for Congress
1079 Sunrise Ave
Ste B 275
Roseville CA 95611 United States
_If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/7m9KTL43aSWI-vWkD0NuIkzxZNJpWsSjZeXTEqfFZ5k=/fmprqdtUZ9pDbEglmMh7pxMe7-Wp7DP4peKXP2iaIA8=)._

name: Mike Siegel
subject: Water is Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1771952/9372330/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA0ZGU1Ni0xNzk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKbwXoml-Z67GTZF_Wep80Pv8SgJkpb-EFEb-DIoNEM=)
Join our team! [Volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1771953/9372331/-1214481066?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA0ZGU1Ni0xNzk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKbwXoml-Z67GTZF_Wep80Pv8SgJkpb-EFEb-DIoNEM=) or [donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1771954/9372332/1664269967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA0ZGU1Ni0xNzk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKbwXoml-Z67GTZF_Wep80Pv8SgJkpb-EFEb-DIoNEM=).
---
Peter,

Water is our most precious natural resource. This weekend, we learned that [**my opponent Michael McCaul is the biggest water-hog in the City of Austin**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1771955/9372333/1701662852?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA0ZGU1Ni0xNzk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKbwXoml-Z67GTZF_Wep80Pv8SgJkpb-EFEb-DIoNEM=), using over 1.4 million gallons a year. _McCaul's manse (credit: Austin-American Statesman)_ Not only is McCaul's conduct wasteful, but it represents a bigger issue: resource-hogging by the wealthiest Americans.** [As I discuss in a new campaign video released today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1771956/9372334/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA0ZGU1Ni0xNzk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKbwXoml-Z67GTZF_Wep80Pv8SgJkpb-EFEb-DIoNEM=&v=-qSuIZelp6s&t=3s),** **water usage is just the tip of the iceberg**. Of greatest concern is McCaul's support for the Republican agenda, which gives trillions in tax benefits to the wealthy while cutting our safety net programs like health care and Social Security. **I want to give every American a fair shot by making sure we all have the basics of life**. We need to return to values like fairness and compassion. We need to get rid of "representatives" who want to take everything for themselves. **[Join us today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1771957/9372335/946621143?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA0ZGU1Ni0xNzk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKbwXoml-Z67GTZF_Wep80Pv8SgJkpb-EFEb-DIoNEM=) in fighting back against special interests and[ representatives like McCaul who take corporate bribes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1771958/9372336/1358834939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA0ZGU1Ni0xNzk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKbwXoml-Z67GTZF_Wep80Pv8SgJkpb-EFEb-DIoNEM=&ipid=hpctp#photo-14867687). ** My campaign is refusing corporate PAC donations. name: =?utf-8?Q?Richard=20Painter?=
subject: Hi Supporter! Join us for an evening of food, fun, and friends!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PAINTER MINNESOTA**
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0df7444bf27f/hi-join-us-for-an-evening-of-food-fun-and-friends?e=ff9d9ff31e)
---
| |
---
| Dear Supporter,

Thank you so much for all your support for our campaign. It’s greatly appreciated and has made a difference!

I’m writing today to ask for your support one last time before the August 14th Primary. Our campaign is organizing a GOTV kick-off event.

This will be an exciting evening with friends, lively discussions and entertainment**. The event will take place on Wednesday, August 8, from 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM, and will be located at The 508 Bar & Restaurant, 508 North First Avenue in Minneapolis, MN 55403. There's plenty of easy parking available.**

**_We are hoping we can list your name on the invitation as a Sponsor._**

**_As a Sponsor, we are hoping you can raise and/or contribute one of the tiered amounts, which are $27, $50, $100, $250, or $500. Your contribution will help us get to the finish line. _**

If you’re able to assist as a Sponsor, please contact me by replying to this email at [richardpainter2018@gmail.com](mailto:richardpainter2018@gmail.com) or by calling 763-691-3506. You may also make an online contribution at: https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute.
The Sponsor invitation is attached below.

This is going to be a fun-filled evening! Thank you for your ongoing support and friendship. It means a lot! We've got this!

Warm regards,

Richard Painter
**Note: there's no charge for the event, we are just soliciting sponsors.**

body:
New information is coming out about how the recent tax reform bill is failing hard-working Arizonans and their families

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/E_CueqWLcjkOb_v5hJ9N4jHbSO0a73Xx49XlI3S1MZg=/s0QlMA2WBF8l9Sv2JVILnfp3NovuMX28wwfgJjlROu4=?refcode=X_072718_EOM_b&amount=25.00&recurring=auto)

Private wage data has shown that wages are actually DROPPING since it passed despite promises of the new law doing just the opposite.

**This bill is bad economics. It is adding billions of dollars to our national deficit and leaving the majority of Americans behind. **

Greg is running for Congress to help build an economy that works for _everyone_.

[**Will you help send him to Washington to work for us by making a donation today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/E_CueqWLcjkOb_v5hJ9N4jHbSO0a73Xx49XlI3S1MZg=/s0QlMA2WBF8l9Sv2JVILnfp3NovuMX28wwfgJjlROu4=?refcode=X_072718_EOM_b&amount=25.00&recurring=auto)

\-- _Team Stanton_

body:
We can send a giant message to everyone watching.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7d1/c1f7015/6acf8925/11427842/2086901293/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730AM_em") Friend, My team just updated me on the numbers, and I wanted to share how close we are to a special milestone. **We 're just 1,901 away from 50,000 grassroots contributions. Now, I know this will be tough, but I think we can hit 50,000 by midnight tomorrow. [Can I count on you to make your first contribution now so we can reach this big goal?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a7d1/c1f7015/6acf8925/11427842/2086901293/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-50000?refcode=rtw_20180730AM_em")** This campaign has never been about how much you give, but that you are invested and part of this movement. **And you are showing with every contribution that you will be the difference in keeping this seat blue -- not the super PACs or special interests.** I know sometimes grassroots donations seem small, but when thousands of people come together to give $5, $10, or even $1 at a time, it creates something truly special. That's how we've built such a powerful campaign with an average grassroots contribution of just $26. Now I have to ask one more time because this goal is big and we don't have much time to hit it: **Will you chip in now so we can hit 50,000 contributions before midnight tomorrow? Every contribution, even $1, gets us closer to our goal and sends a message about the power of our grassroots campaign. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Thank you for everything, Tina

Your support is critical for us to win this race. name: Ben Jealous
subject: The legacy of Medicare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Let's make historic progress again.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb19/2192282759/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A") Friend, Fifty-three years ago today, President Lyndon B. Johnson traveled to the Truman Library in Independence, Missouri, to sign Medicare into law. It took 20 years for Medicare to become law from when it was first proposed by Harry Truman. In those two decades, Republican and Democratic presidents alike tried to create government-funded health care to cover senior citizens who needed access to affordable, quality care. So why has it taken nearly half a century to expand upon the foundation they built? Elected officials who supported Medicare in the 1960s faced the same opposition many of us face today. But the congressional champion of Medicare, Clinton Anderson of New Mexico, didn't back down. "Perhaps a man who has spent much of his life fighting off the effects of illness," he once wrote, "acquires...an understanding of the importance of professional health care to all people." **That's why Medicare-for-All is a central part of my platform. I know how much this means to people, and how much it could help. But Larry Hogan is spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to portray me as a communist for believing in providing quality, affordable health care to everyone who needs it.** [**That's why we need to raise $60,000 before tomorrow night, and we only have $10,000 left to go -- will you donate $5 or more to fund the fight?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb19/2192282759/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb18/2192282759/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A&amount=5&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb1b/2192282759/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A&amount=25&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb1a/2192282759/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A&amount=50&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb05/2192282759/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb04/2192282759/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb07/2192282759/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A&express_lane=true")
---
After the passage of Medicare, the number of elderly citizens lacking access to hospitals and doctors plummeted. But even in 1965, legislators knew that passing historic legislation like Medicare was simply the first step of many.
But even then it wasn't simply perseverance with the legislators on Capitol Hill that made the difference -- it was a big election where voters changed the balance of power that made the difference. That's what it'll take here, too.
If we want historic steps forward like Medicare-for-All we can't expect it with the status quo, and that's exactly why I'm running. The people of this state deserve better than what they have, and it's going to take big, bold ideas to give them that. That's what this campaign is about -- and I hope you'll support it.
**I believe that health care is a moral imperative and human right, and that's why I support Medicare-for-All. Larry Hogan disagrees.** [**It shouldn't take another decade, much less half a century, to build on the progress of Medicare -- if you want this, you need to fund the fight. Donate $5 or more before tomorrow's midnight deadline.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb19/2192282759/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A")
Thanks,
Ben

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb19/2192282759/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07308A")
---

Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac54/7ab0e2c4/7ff1a701/349bcb01/2192282759/VEsHBw/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. name: Elise C.
subject: Wake-up call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

There's no doubt: Minnesota will play a critical role in 2018. CNN called it "ground zero." Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ called it a "state to watch."

**And just last month, the President was in Duluth and we got a taste of what he 's willing to do in this election.** _Don 't forget, President Trump only lost Minnesota by two points in 2016._

The results of this election will determine the fate of the issues we care about and the direction of our state and country. We can't let President Trump have the last word.

**In the last 99 days of this campaign, we have to stay 100% focused on our Minnesota values -- hard work, getting things done, and investing in one another.**

There's too much at stake for Minnesotans to lose a voice like Amy's. She's fighting for a stronger economy, a cleaner environment, and protecting our elections from foreign interference.

**If you 're committed to re-electing Amy the Minnesota way, will you make a contribution to help us hit our $50,000 end-of-month goal before the deadline tomorrow?**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Thanks,

Elise C.

name: Rebecca Kasper
subject: re: re: what Matt said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | | **Hey -- I have to piggyback on what Matt said. This is a critical time for our campaign, and coming up short isn 't an option. We did not come this far and work this hard just to lose our momentum in the final stretch.**

**[If you haven't pitched in yet, please make a contribution of just $5 TODAY.](http://act.kyrstensinema. name: Jeffrey Carson, AustinPetersen.com
subject: MASSIVE campaign update for Austin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Good morning Friend! Wow. I have a massive campaign update for Austin this week. Our campaign is blowing up in the news. I think nearly every major national outlet and every Missouri news outlet has published a story about Austin in the last seven days. We are also a week away from the election! The momentum is on our side but we have a lot of work left to do. **Ghost Gunner 2 News:** Last week, Austin announced the campaign’s last giveaway before the primary. Let’s just say, besides triggering a bunch of liberals on social media, it blew up in the news as well. Austin announced we are giving away a Ghost Gunner 2, which is a machine that builds 80% AR-15 lowers that are untraceable. I think just about every major news outlet covered the story. You can read about it on [Fox News](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.foxnews.com%2Fpolitics%2F2018%2F07%2F25%2Fmissouri-senate-candidate-raffling-machine-that-can-print-untraceable-gun-parts.html&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=1), [Breitbart,](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.breitbart.com%2Fbig-government%2F2018%2F07%2F23%2Fmissouri-senate-challenger-celebrates-2nd-amendment-gun-printer-giveaway%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=2) [Town Hall,](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftownhall.com%2Fnotebook%2Fbethbaumann%2F2018%2F07%2F24%2Fgop-senate-candidate-celebrates-2a-win-with-a-controversial-raffle-n2503370&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=3) [Second Amendment Daily News](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.secondamendmentdaily.com%2F2018%2F07%2Ftriggered-missouri-u-s-senate-candidate-giving-away-3d-printer%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=4), [Vice News](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fnews.vice.com%2Fen_us%2Farticle%2Fywkbxg%2Fthis-gop-candidate-wants-to-trigger-liberals-with-3d-gun-part-printer-giveaway&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=5), and [The Hill](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fthehill.com%2Fhomenews%2Fstate-watch%2F398787-missouri-senate-candidate-giving-away-machine-that-can-print-untraceable&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=6). You can also read about it in almost every Missouri news outlet, too. Check it out on [The Kansas City Star](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kansascity.com%2Fnews%2Fpolitics-government%2Farticle215524335.html&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=7), [KCUR](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.kcur.org%2Fpost%2Fmissouris-hawley-has-money-gop-senate-primary-will-he-get-votes%23stream%2F0&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=8), [KFVS](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.kfvs12.com%2Fstory%2F38731051%2Fgop-missouri-senate-candidate-giving-away-machine-for-rifles&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=9), and the [RiverFront Times](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.riverfronttimes.com%2Fnewsblog%2F2018%2F07%2F25%2Fmissouri-senate-candidate-is-giving-away-a-ghost-gun-machine&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=10). As you can see, we took the media by storm last week. While Josh Hawley and Claire McCaskill are doing everything they can to take away your Second Amendment rights, Austin is doing he can to expand them. [**If you would like to enter the giveaway, please click here to add your name.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/ghost_gunner?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=11) **Best Candidate To Defeat McCaskill:** As the election draws near, Austin is making his case why he is the best candidate to take down Claire McCaskill in November and the media picking up on it. [Check out this interview Austin did with the Daily Wire on how he is the best candidate to defeat McCaskill in November.](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailywire.com%2Fnews%2F33505%2Fexclusive-senate-candidate-austin-petersen-why-frank-camp%3Famp&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=12) [He also got a similar interview with KZRG that you can read here.](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fnewstalkkzrg.com%2F2018%2F07%2F23%2Faustin-petersen-im-the-only-republican-that-can-beat-claire-mccaskill%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=13) **Volunteers Needed:** As we approach the August 7th primary, we need to get as many volunteers making phone calls as possible! Our voter outreach efforts are far superior than josh Hawley’s campaign. This is the most effective way we can reach voters and tell them about our message. We are also encouraging those willing to come to Kansas City, MO and help us with the final push. [**Please click here to volunteer and make phone calls for Austin Petersen >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/volunteer?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=14) Thanks, Friend. Jeffrey Carson
Campaign Manager
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=073018_update&n=15))

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: My update from the first day of our 34-day road trip across Texas:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I’m writing to you from the Hotel Limpia in Fort Davis where Amy and I
stayed last night. We had a fun, open-air town hall in the courtyard, more
than 300 came out from Jeff Davis County and points beyond to enjoy the
open sky, the beautiful evening, and a chance to play a decisive role in
winning this election. I talked about visiting Fort Davis last year and
sleeping under the stars in Davis Mountains State Park with Amy and Henry,
about eating sweet rolls in nearby Alpine at Bread and Breakfast, about
the adventures we’ve had, the people we’ve met, the stories we’ve heard
and the work that we want to do for Texas and the country.

I answered questions about money in politics, bipartisanship in Congress,
and our opportunity to better serve the veterans who’ve served this
country. We took photos, caught up with friends and had dinner with the
campaign team.

We started the day at our home in El Paso, loading the truck for 34 days
straight on the road. We met friends, family and supporters at our El Paso
headquarters for menudo and mariachis and a rollicking early morning rally
before hitting the road, due East. We dropped Henry off at camp not too
far from the McDonald Observatory and then came into Fort Davis to begin
our town hall.

One of the things that struck me from El Paso yesterday morning and Fort
Davis last night is the number of people who have signed up to volunteer
-- knock on doors, make phone calls, text their fellow Texans -- people
who share with me that this election is too important, too much is on the
line, to sit this one out. Or to do anything less than give it everything
they’ve got.

When we get together at these town halls and rallies, there’s an energy
that turns into action -- registering, volunteering, and voting -- that
will determine the outcome of this election.

We will be on the road for the next 33 days, holding nearly 100 town halls
and visiting communities in every part of Texas. Excited to see old
friends and looking forward to making new ones. Lucky to take part in this
amazing work going on in Texas right now.

And with 99 days left to go before election day, these town halls, the
people we meet, the commitments we make to one another are more important
than ever. [ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180730&amount=3&t=1001&akid=1890%2E444211%2EM7Tajg ]Thank you for ensuring we have the resources to continue to
campaign in this way -- without PACs, visiting all 254 counties, welcoming
Republicans, Independents, Democrats alike into this campaign and our
effort to do something great for Texas and the country.

I am grateful.

Beto

clean_body: [1]Beto for Texas I’m writing to you from the Hotel Limpia in Fort Davis where Amy and I stayed last night. We had a fun, open-air town hall in the courtyard, more than 300 came out from Jeff Davis County and points beyond to enjoy the open sky, the beautiful evening, and a chance to play a decisive role in winning this election. I talked about visiting Fort Davis last year and sleeping under the stars in Davis Mountains State Park with Amy and Henry, about eating sweet rolls in nearby Alpine at Bread and Breakfast, about the adventures we’ve had, the people we’ve met, the stories we’ve heard and the work that we want to do for Texas and the country. I answered questions about money in politics, bipartisanship in Congress, and our opportunity to better serve the veterans who’ve served this country. We took photos, caught up with friends and had dinner with the campaign team. We started the day at our home in El Paso, loading the truck for 34 days straight on the road. We met friends, family and supporters at our El Paso headquarters for menudo and mariachis and a rollicking early morning rally before hitting the road, due East. We dropped Henry off at camp not too far from the McDonald Observatory and then came into Fort Davis to begin our town hall. One of the things that struck me from El Paso yesterday morning and Fort Davis last night is the number of people who have signed up to volunteer -- knock on doors, make phone calls, text their fellow Texans -- people who share with me that this election is too important, too much is on the line, to sit this one out. Or to do anything less than give it everything they’ve got. When we get together at these town halls and rallies, there’s an energy that turns into action -- registering, volunteering, and voting -- that will determine the outcome of this election. We will be on the road for the next 33 days, holding nearly 100 town halls and visiting communities in every part of Texas. Excited to see old friends and looking forward to making new ones. Lucky to take part in this amazing work going on in Texas right now. And with 99 days left to go before election day, these town halls, the people we meet, the commitments we make to one another are more important than ever. [ ]Thank you for ensuring we have the resources to continue to campaign in this way -- without PACs, visiting all 254 counties, welcoming Republicans, Independents, Democrats alike into this campaign and our effort to do something great for Texas and the country. I am grateful. Beto [ ]Contribute $3 Contribute to Beto's campaign:

subject: Upcoming Trainings

body:
**WV Democratic Party Candidate and Activist Trainings**

**Charleston on Saturday, August 4, 2018**
at IUOE, 606 Tennessee Avenue, Charleston, WV

OR

**Morgantown on Saturday, August 11, 2018**
at SpringHill Suites by Marriott, 1910 Hunter’s Way, Morgantown, WV

**8:30 am until 5:00 pm**

Lunch will be provided. There is no charge to attend. We recommend that you bring your laptop and cell phone. Space is limited, so sign up today!

**Register online: [https://bit.ly/2LHXtXT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1773199/9378309/-823425009?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjNhYWU4MS0yZDk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhSY_aaSNqmhWSCi7JIsx6xiIFj53KycRJGwc7a_ds4=) **or by email: [WVDPtraining@gmail.com](mailto:WVDPtraining@gmail.com)

Each training will offer two tracks:

**Candidate:** focused on running an effective campaign, for those running, managing or planning a run. Includes: Targeting, Research, Message, Field, VAN/Mini-VAN, Fundraising, Budget, Voter Contact

OR

**Activist:** focused on field, for those who wish to help candidates, local parties or organizations.
Includes: Advanced VAN & MiniVAN, Scores, Field, Phones & Virtual Phone Banks, Events

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.

PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ | Fellow Conservative,

I am really worried.

New polls show Nancy Pelosi ahead by a mile. In fact, the Democrats are leading by almost 8 points, one of the biggest gaps we’ve seen in months!

[**Close the Gap >>**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjExLTkwNzYyMTNjMThjYTQwN2I5ZWFmMzAzNTE5NjU5YWM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgwNzI4XzExMjU0Njg2NQ%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250cmlidXRlLm5yY2Mub3JnL2ZlYy1lbmQtb2YtcXVhcnRlci1kZWFkbGluZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UEFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFByb3NwZWN0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDczMF9QQUUtR09QM19LYXJsUm92ZSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDE4MDczMF9Zb3VTaG91bGRTZWVUaGlz&K=Kmbo9P-WU3g-5ftTe4Ez9Q)

This is terrible news for Republicans, and why I’m reaching out to you.

You are at the top of the list of dedicated Conservatives. So, I know you are willing to do whatever it takes to help President Trump’s House Conservatives to stay in the Majority.

If Conservatives don’t raise another $10,000 by their FEC deadline Tuesday, then there will be less hope for Republicans to close the gap by election day.

Because this is so important, I’ve been authorized to tell you there will be a QUADRUPLE-MATCH for all gifts received today. This authorization is only in effect for our most valued supporters. And, only if you act NOW.
**All gifts worth 4x as much**
**[Contribute $100 >>>](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjExLTkwNzYyMTNjMThjYTQwN2I5ZWFmMzAzNTE5NjU5YWM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgwNzI0XzEzMDc1Mzc3OA%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250cmlidXRlLm5yY2Mub3JnL2ZlYy1lbmQtb2YtcXVhcnRlci1kZWFkbGluZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTEwMCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPVBBRS1HT1AzJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWxQcm9zcGVjdCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA3MzBfUEFFLUdPUDNfS2FybFJvdmUmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAxODA3MzBfWW91U2hvdWxkU2VlVGhpcw&K=16pN7rI-Wtw7t_O5JD1b3w)

[Contribute $50>>>](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjExLTkwNzYyMTNjMThjYTQwN2I5ZWFmMzAzNTE5NjU5YWM5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgwNzI0XzEzMDgwNjg5OA%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250cmlidXRlLm5yY2Mub3JnL2ZlYy1lbmQtb2YtcXVhcnRlci1kZWFkbGluZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9UEFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFByb3NwZWN0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDczMF9QQUUtR09QM19LYXJsUm92ZSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDE4MDczMF9Zb3VTaG91bGRTZWVUaGlz&K=qs4GP2HvPd6Vb_9MipKORQ)

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Checks and balances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Our federal system of checks and balances is broken. It's time for the states to step up.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7849d/2f5ea88d/77355654/2cbc3efd/1903934469/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-6&refcode=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-6&utm_campaign=july-eom-6&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, What a month it has been for our democracy. Congress is about to acquiesce to President Trump's nomination of Brett Kavanaugh, who does not believe sitting presidents should have to undergo criminal investigations when they break the law. Given the president's recent deference to Putin and more evidence emerging of Russian involvement in 2016, this is a serious concern. Kavanaugh's deference to executive power is a sign that we will no longer be able to rely on the Supreme Court to check and balance a dangerous president. His past anti-choice, anti-immigrant rulings endanger our most basic freedoms. _Roe v. Wade_ is on the chopping block -- as are our voting rights, marriage equality, and so much of our progress. And we can't count on the Republican majority in Congress to do anything about it. **The situation in our national government is serious. Our system of checks and balances on a rogue president has failed. But that's all the more reason we need to boost the power of the states.** [**If we can't count on our systems of checks and balances working in D.C., we must strengthen the progressive movement in our states. We're proving the power of progressive ideas to change a state -- be a part of this work by investing $5 today before our July deadline.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7849d/2f5ea88d/77355654/2cbc3efd/1903934469/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-6&refcode=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-6&utm_campaign=july-eom-6&utm_medium=ema") We've seen a progressive agenda work here in Washington -- that's why we're the #1 state economy in the country. We've made great progress but we must keep moving forward. While Trump and his extremist allies in D.C. have launched an unprecedented crusade against a woman's right to choose, in Washington state were taking action to protect and promote a pro-choice agenda. That's why we passed the landmark _Reproductive Parity Act_ this year. While Trump's administration denies asylum seekers and fails to reunite separated families, Washington will always be a state that welcomes newcomers. It's why we sued Trump over his disastrous border policy. We won't back down here, no matter what D.C. or this president does. Our federal system of checks and balances is broken. Progress is not going to come from the White House, Congress, or the Supreme Court -- which is why we must strengthen our power in the states, and show leadership in these disturbing times. [**Before our end-of-the-month deadline, will you join me on the frontlines of defending our values by investing in the work ahead?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7849d/2f5ea88d/77355654/2cbc3efd/1903934469/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-6&refcode=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-6&utm_campaign=july-eom-6&utm_medium=ema") This is clearly a call for action for all of us. I hope we can count on you to support our fight. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7849d/2f5ea88d/77355654/2cbc3efd/1903934469/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-6&refcode=ema_2018-07-30_july-eom-6&utm_campaign=july-eom-6&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: Team Mel
subject: This is what we need in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
_**" I've believed my whole life that what you do speaks much louder than what you say." **_

Friends, the quote above is from Mel, and it's the reason we're working so hard to send him to Congress.

Mel will approach serving in Congress the same way he did serving as a minister, and leading a health care company -- by following up words with actions. And we badly need that in D.C.

**[Contribute $5 to elect Mel before tomorrow's big end-of-month deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/olApXH8ydanUaOyBCV1oK4ZguzbSJOZ9ianrD9elOzU=/nrrdFvXr2Hi8H_0tTKMX1r0zxv1kGoFbvnJrU2hq_LI=?refcode=em180730)**

When Mel talks about protecting and improving our health care, we know he'll do it, because he led a health care company focused on improving patient care.

When he talks about creating jobs, and building an economy that works for all Hoosiers, we know he'll make it happen, because he created more than 800 good-paying jobs right here in Northern Indiana -- while raising wages and improving employee benefits.

Mel has let his actions speak louder than words his whole life. Indiana's 2nd Congressional District needs a representative who will do the same.

**Mel is counting on your support before tomorrow 's deadline, friends. Contribute $5 by midnight tomorrow to send Mel to Congress.**
