This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6911bac5d5e8414da1a50448de7792ae&_e=Q_cRXINSp40LKE3LAdFkTFEVoRX96UOyM-p7foX5-MTPRsiubM1IrbFWXZxGG9b2gDgAlDKciTlqY_NwmEz0OsDkqD9cv_cb6gQpkGaYVUTZGzZiPzPixKwPsJQ4m1PzK0jBehoXy0Atg7cWRtWaLPnvp1g8kYrQvlHBYLBVgOeEZKPP29w9xehWiTVmjlnz7O-sbyhMjUDSbh_l1tJy6R7CDQ5MrNw288_6ZPgLzPMK0QfNpqE4c6_b--mJM8ka). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6911bac5d5e8414da1a50448de7792ae&_e=10FQaJPUH0lFTMINKUqydSS69lisH0W65rjqAm0SEk4f4BYO2jrayShvWMZP9jUDMCZlBm6V7VKOcmDOrCx3Hx8mVywU2ovcF5qdj98iFx0XcEY7xh-cjd6_JdTo5OLSS1AU4jbtMX3RXsk9yZQzwUchWlrv1lPZHQqRwkx-rZJXvhm33No8HBG0cinc14OoO16t4ZE3GU6wmsl1TXs2rLITrnlbx5TzAxdwu1GvOgfwCVHuuBxOac7ZqB2VuEkkI81kL5uqh9jMOBYXqkiwofBCpANGLLzcXEeYFijSws4sNO6dZDYQaq4w1OuJqzJ195KAriPy6a1GKyXtB1RZA8B0FZ-PNexAo2QsTh1hk-Xh89HQe4zjDG0CSzoOv1v4) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6911bac5d5e8414da1a50448de7792ae&_e=10FQaJPUH0lFTMINKUqydSS69lisH0W65rjqAm0SEk6B_B0a69Hn4d2nqPGaUyEiojKfrYDPxQBCAiBCHVYFnELiYqqz2UVowl3U1fS_xc8ET_KCqj1gt8r9ufPk26ip2cFUwHhjXYTKMFnXsTqI5rzE9SsILz8RlUzDhN8mfEPJdkiAeH0IroWLDlWfbcN2KXXFUtsqz5SiaqlsMwsELPR_LCRoKefeCH8l3SMjoRai3vKpZkVL-No-IH3lnhSLqnyx5qBfkj-QnygcqCvMmgS12p0O_wtoU_MRNZxaNRAd_8p6eB0eGPC0_rtN1abRjo7ESA3hC5KT0WVeaIMffNraujT5tv_cOeMVH9T16QqxnDW9V1BgbXGYl9IYvVJw) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6911bac5d5e8414da1a50448de7792ae&_e=10FQaJPUH0lFTMINKUqydQ4EQFP3GEyWGvvt45mRCZDYkQuzWVWdKJtR030SsLCDh4yr-JTJ_MdFTScdVmJc_TnY6TesmppboMIocJ0CJmkOXDQh-nrVbZ-bsZBiykgJVFyCfr2HpB3_-zwhvE7cTai1qV7I5tG-fyx7aB-xvMBxh-fQYF019I8-Y0HDTIq-Dv8T0t4PrwNGRnGWfE1M5KRJNna3siGNg2z7ZuRB-7Zul2I75Qzus-elFsd2MWSuyh7TRzmUPQR--iobAIASDQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6911bac5d5e8414da1a50448de7792ae&_e=10FQaJPUH0lFTMINKUqydciu5mhGxCShUrkWh63XPBOnRFQGxFyonLrkzvTTjtds8C3fIPDVwI1oO8zNYd4ZKPfE6fCeGWd5prgmyXaOFQgYuehf70kUITlI5m87NTOfEFt6KIaGHSfP3oFRZ-_nuPZPv-B7LzrJ7NHrAt6iwRic4BUHwhQetXd0akVKWlLfogDl0FCglC--IK11t3CtZaij-3U4eaJfv51I_P6ATuckOOgJgYf9SvUVxOdFdDaH2OZ-nIyarkQ2_A8wklcF7w%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6911bac5d5e8414da1a50448de7792ae&_e=10FQaJPUH0lFTMINKUqydd46xpavT1JPCXH14R6sxw3c9PQ3ndfx42xTtH5z-IjSlqj6nhLcDvWP8C8iW6M6XVultzF0_bZFdJkcqoacWwxTABqINNFol-JRVpNrgpLUO43H7ltRv-ZcZQvUBJHzH2RMGBOxRaKPouDUUIONDXdBReXYELk4Nfxiclbu8I05WrRgBbdjLYTLhdisq-zmdpFiDyk2voIxsOAcOdAENWACS3rM3cWkxWEOhVtTIO23CUl15ow5IRGhwTYCtxpYwg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6911bac5d5e8414da1a50448de7792ae&_e=10FQaJPUH0lFTMINKUqydSS69lisH0W65rjqAm0SEk7e8VSJp7xzDB5kU9BuD1JqkjX7WbukPu3KLuvogH7LBKwW9LWFXQYPkxnLSK2SKqTQK13TPmzq-BbLrcfV2BZH08u9sgaa6Lir7hJX0VAdWhAEAMtAkC2lx7qfoyX8PudVe8QsoAzS0gYGj9Nnw_Twse9bjRNeGek5vNGsyqnqanWJZML_iJdqzHGBNJzVgRu1W8nWeHhv22s7tDSHGpguOccGyNzFdUwLpYrzOYBZMJGdS8Ap1Asq49TI3QKq6Jp0b5gPIvAs4j-BXIm0QWwAhJMzFU7yRiXMQGqcgFMOQNz--VXH6YxlTj7InZqv8ByIZccd6o_oJghP5B4eSNaf9-An1Bmd7yuM7ECwIgC2Ow%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6911bac5d5e8414da1a50448de7792ae&_e=Q_cRXINSp40LKE3LAdFkTFEVoRX96UOyM-p7foX5-MTPRsiubM1IrbFWXZxGG9b2gDgAlDKciTlqY_NwmEz0OsDkqD9cv_cb6gQpkGaYVUTZGzZiPzPixKwPsJQ4m1PzK0jBehoXy0Atg7cWRtWaLPnvp1g8kYrQvlHBYLBVgOeEZKPP29w9xehWiTVmjlnz7O-sbyhMjUDSbh_l1tJy6R7CDQ5MrNw288_6ZPgLzPMK0QfNpqE4c6_b--mJM8ka) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=6911bac5d5e8414da1a50448de7792ae&_e=Q_cRXINSp40LKE3LAdFkTFEVoRX96UOyM-p7foX5-MTPRsiubM1IrbFWXZxGG9b2gDgAlDKciTlqY_NwmEz0OsDkqD9cv_cb6gQpkGaYVUTZGzZiPzPixKwPsJQ4m1PzK0jBehoXy0Atg7cWRtWaLPnvp1g8kYrQvlHBYLBVgOeEZKPP29w9xehWiTVmjlnz7O-sbyhMjUDSbh_l1tJy6R7CDQ5MrNw288_6ZPgLzPMK0QfNpqE4c6_b--mJM8ka) to unsubscribe. clean_body: It’s our LAST end-of-month fundraising deadline before the August 14th primary, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching the goal we set... Friend, we’re approaching a critical point in our campaign. It’s our LAST end-of-month fundraising deadline before the August 14th primary, and as of this email, we are just short of reaching the goal we set for July. We have $23,211 left to go and friend, I need your help today to make sure we fill this gap. Will you make an emergency donation? First Name:** Friend Email: Status: NOT ACCEPTED | I'm just going to be honest with you, friend. Senator Baldwin and the political elite are outraising AND outspending us! They've already spent millions to make Wisconsin a blue state again. And with DC special interests wanting to protect the status quo, we're facing heat on BOTH sides of the aisle. We HAVE to make sure our campaign is prepared to take all that they're throwing at us. To do that, we NEED to reach our goals. Can you chip in today? Please, Friend, let's make this month a good one so we can head into the primary with confidence. If you can chip in today, even just $25, it would be a big help in bringing our fight straight to Washington: ** Thank you, friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: have a second, please?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
I just checked in with my team because our July fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and we're still a bit short of our goal.
Not dramatically -- in fact my team says that $3 would be really helpful in getting us back on track.
You're one of the strongest members of this team, so I'm turning to you. Will you please give $3 or more so that we can end the month where we need to be?
[**https://hassan.bsd.net/July-Deadline**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0dc/2a380d31/c351f11/f1be5d/2754490103/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDczMF9NV0gtRU9NMV82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180730_MWH-EOM1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
We won our election in 2016 by just 1,017 votes, so missing even one benchmark could be extremely costly.
I'm grateful to have you by my side, and I'm very thankful for your support.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Akilah Ensley, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Three's our lucky number
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37ae/9e00690/59c865ad/2402fa35/3260341766/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&source=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx")
Friends,

By now, I hope you've seen our first TV ad -- Mayor Andrew Gillum is tackling head on what everyone said at the beginning was impossible.

The son of a city bus driver and construction worker is on his way to making history and becoming the next Governor of Florida. And now that we have an extra boost, we need your help to set the pace in the final 29 days of the election.

Tomorrow is our FINAL end-of-month deadline before the primary and what we raise now will show everyone we have the momentum to win. **We need to close out this month big.** **So, every donation given now until tomorrow at midnight will be _TRIPLE matched!_**

**[So, can I count on you to chip in $5 now?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37ae/9e00690/59c865ad/2402fa34/3260341766/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2324&refcode=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+FIRSTNAMESo+can+I+count+on+you+to+chip+i")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$5 Donation = $15](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37ae/9e00690/59c865ad/2402fa37/3260341766/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2324&refcode=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=3+-+5+Donation++15") | [$25 Donation = $75](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37ae/9e00690/59c865ad/2402fa36/3260341766/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2324&refcode=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_content=4+-+25+Donation++75")
---|---
[$100 Donation = $300](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37ae/9e00690/59c865ad/2402fac9/3260341766/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2324&refcode=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_content=5+-+100+Donation++300") | [$250 Donation = $750](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37ae/9e00690/59c865ad/2402fac8/3260341766/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2324&refcode=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=250&utm_content=6+-+250+Donation++750")
[Donate another amount](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37ae/9e00690/59c865ad/2402facb/3260341766/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2324&refcode=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&utm_content=7+-+Donate+another+amount")
With volunteers hitting the streets to lay the groundwork for this election and our new TV ad re-enforcing how Mayor Gillum has the background, bold, progressive plans, and the charisma to turn out the voters Democrats need to take back the Governor's mansion, we can win the August 28 primary. But we need your help to do it.

This is a huge moment. What we do now will determine what kind of campaign we can keep running in the final, crucial weeks of this race. So, you can stretch your dollar -- and impact on this campaign -- even further by making a donation today.

**[Chip in $5 or more before tomorrow's final end-of-month deadline and have your donation triple matched!](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37ae/9e00690/59c865ad/2402faca/3260341766/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2324&refcode=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_EOM1_fnd_gq_nono__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=8+-+Chip+in+5+or+more+before+tomorrowrsquos+")**

Thank you,

Akilah Ensley
Finance Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

name: Michael Eisenstatt, Bredesen 2018
subject: Here’s what your support made possible last weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Team --
Our campaign is focused on running this race the right way — bringing people together to get our message in front of voters. And this past weekend, we did just that with our Weekend Of Action to mark 100 days until Election Day in November and to get out the vote for the Primary on Thursday.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1774986/9386480/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmQ1YzgwNS0zZDk0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=13QNFKdng1Cm7BD1B8I27zpuYDq_uoYHAvlHJ_TZIXM=&refcode=em180730-pre-primary-deadline-4-miss)
From now to Election Day, people from all backgrounds will join together in field offices across the state to dial phones, knock on doors, and help put our message of common sense leadership in front of Tennesseans.
**And your support is what’s making that possible. Can you help us keep this up?**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
**We are making real progress in the Ocean State.** Four years ago, we had the highest unemployment rate in America. Today, more people are working than at any time in the last 10 years.
**We have the monthly fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow at midnight -- it 's critical we hit our goal so we can continue working to help ALL Rhode Islanders. [Click here now to give $23 or as much as you can!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0f1/5e076a9e/5400e243/144267b5/1063499147/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180730")**
The stakes are too high -- we can't afford to go back to how things were before. **Today, we released a set of second-term goals to protect Rhode Island 's working families.** From equal pay for every worker to reining in predatory payday lending and cracking down on wage theft, we've got a lot of work to do to breakdown unfair obstacles to opportunity.
**[Can you donate $23 or as much as you are able before the deadline?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0f1/5e076a9e/5400e243/144267b5/1063499147/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180730") With your help, we can create a better Rhode Island for everyone.**
Many thanks,
Gina

\-------

If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.
###### Friends of Gina Raimondo

Providence, RI 02940

body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hello,

Scott Wagner may take a "whatever happens, happens" approach to women's health.

But Governor Wolf will do everything he can to defend women's rights and health care, whether President Trump is trying to slash Planned Parenthood funding, or if he's packing the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

**We want to show that THOUSANDS are standing with Tom in the fight for women's rights. So we're releasing a new limited-edition sticker, and wanted to give you a chance to get yours first.** [**Get your free pro-choice sticker now and show you won't let "whatever" happen to women's rights in Pennsylvania. Request your sticker now >>**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec3ac/73a2bc12/3951a190/1fce3c88/1893667655/VEsH/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/get-your-free-whatever-happens-sticker?gpsid=8_50_2420&source=em18_180730_sticke_adv_gq_ful__FSA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_sticke_adv_gq_ful__FSA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=1+-+Get+your+free+prochoice+sticker+now+and+")

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Corruption's such an old song that we can sing along in harmony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
History has its eyes on you.
#

Peter -
We have 45 days until our primary, so if sometimes we **write like we 're running out of time**, it's because we quite literally are.
We must work **non-stop** in the coming weeks to make sure New York elects an independent Attorney General. We are in the midst of a Constitutional crisis. **History has its eyes on you.**
Our next Attorney General's top priority must be to root out the corruption that is poisoning our politics. **Corruption 's such an old song that we can sing along in harmony, and nowhere is it stronger than in Albany.**
I will do that. It's why I have rejected all corporate money, but that means I need you to **rise up:**
**[Can you make a $3 donation right now to help us fight back against the political and financial establishment that wants to stop us? This is important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e83/6e822e2f/1a611193/41724faa/1363923729/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MzAtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180730-full")**
Too many of the decisions affecting our economic and political institutions are happening behind closed doors -- shutting the people out of **the room where it happens**. And Albany's old boys' club continues to silence women by sweeping the rampant sexual misconduct under the rug.
With this election, we can change all of this. I will be a voice for working people. Together, we will **include women in the sequel** by electing the first woman as New York AG.
Throughout my career, there has been a singular guiding force: **I 've seen injustice in the world, and I've corrected it.**
So when people ask, **" Why do you always say what you believe?"** The answer is simple: The only way to fix our politics is to elect people who are unafraid of speaking truth to power. People who will take on corrupt politicians and **overwhelm them with honesty.**
But I cannot do this alone. I need you to **rise up:**
**[Make a $3 donation today. Every donation matters because it sends a signal about the depth of our grassroots strength. With your help, we will win.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e83/6e822e2f/1a611193/41724faa/1363923729/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MzAtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180730-full")**
Thank you again for your support. This is an incredible opportunity for us to seek justice. **We cannot throw away our shot.**
Best,
Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e83/6e822e2f/1a611193/41724faa/1363923729/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MzAtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180730-full")**

* * *

1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: this race is tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
It's now or never, Friends: My friend Claire McCaskill is running in what The Washington Post has called one of THE most competitive Senate races of the cycle. **And after a recent poll showed Missouri's race was tied, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight said there's a "great chance" the GOP will be able to steal this seat.**

**Democrats _cannot_ take back the Senate if we lose in Missouri, and the GOP knows it. **That's why President Trump has already flown to Missouri four times to fundraise for Claire's right-wing opponent, and a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC has poured $10 million into stealing this seat.

Claire's facing an uphill battle, so she absolutely needs to raise another $12,000 by midnight to win. Grassroots support in a race like hers will be the difference between winning and losing, so **I'm counting on you to step up and give whatever you can to help Claire win in November and protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat. [Will you give $5 right now to help keep Missouri blue so we can take back the Senate in 2018?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk863-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**

_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Claire McCaskill and Jeanne Shaheen:_ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk863-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk863-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk863-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk863-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thanks for stepping up.

Jeanne

clean_body: | | | It's now or never, Friends: My friend Claire McCaskill is running in what The Washington Post has called one of THE most competitive Senate races of the cycle. And after a recent poll showed Missouri's race was tied, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight said there's a "great chance" the GOP will be able to steal this seat. Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose in Missouri, and the GOP knows it. That's why President Trump has already flown to Missouri four times to fundraise for Claire's right-wing opponent, and a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC has poured $10 million into stealing this seat. Claire's facing an uphill battle, so she absolutely needs to raise another $12,000 by midnight to win. Grassroots support in a race like hers will be the difference between winning and losing, so I'm counting on you to step up and give whatever you can to help Claire win in November and protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Claire McCaskill and Jeanne Shaheen: Thanks for stepping up. Jeanne | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Blue Pennsylvania 2018
subject: He will attack Bob, in 4 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6019/51dbcc2a/19cf0bcc/3a6a964/1688143004/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Bob needs to raise $40,000 for rapid response before President Trump speaks in Pennsylvania on Thursday [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

We can't sleep on this, team: **President Trump is coming to Pennsylvania this week to campaign for Congressman Lou Barletta.** He's going to use his platform to attack Bob and boost Barletta, his close friend and hand-picked candidate in this race.

**_[Pennsylvania deserves better than Lou Barletta, but he's about to get a big boost from the president. Help Bob fight back by chipping in $5 today.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Barletta is a rubber stamp for the President's disastrous agenda. He has:
* Parroted the administration's talking points on their inhumane family separation policy
* Supported multiple attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act and voted for their corporate tax cut
* Voted with the president 99% of the time

We can't afford to underestimate the value of this presidential visit for Barletta's campaign. The president's speech, including his attacks on Bob, will be broadcast across the state. That's why we've set such a big fundraising goal: fighting back against the president's misinformation will be expensive, but every voter deserves to know the truth about this race.

**Show President Trump where you stand -- donate $5 to Bob's campaign today:**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks for having Bob's back, team. [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

We're just 99 days away from Election Day (!!) and two days away from the end of July - **the first month of the very last public fundraising quarter of the 2018 election.**

We have a lot of work to do between now and November. That's why we set a goal to raise $130,000 in July and start our last fundraising quarter of the election strong.

But so far, July has been a hard month for Tim's campaign - we could come up short on a major fundraising goal.

**The month ends tomorrow and we 're still $9,200 short. [Chip in now and help us close that gap before time runs out at midnight tomorrow >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12d8/3e0906/6e018d5f/3e353ba4/2997401656/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180730_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-goal-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in+now+and+help+us+close+that+gap+b&utm_campaign=20180730_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-goal-LDND&source=20180730_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-goal-LDND")**

name: Kathy Manning
subject: This could go either way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Team, I decided to get into this race for a simple reason. I believe that families across the 13th District deserve someone fighting for them. For their jobs, their health, their safety -- and not that of special interests. I'm so proud of how far we've come. We've been able to bring our message to voters across the district and turned what was considered a long-shot into one of the **most competitive races this year.** Just this weekend, our grassroots team reached out to over 3,000 voters by knocking doors, making phone calls, and registering people to vote. The energy on the ground is contagious and momentum grows each and every day. | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542783a/e3b7d3/5c232dc1/2555fba0/1277983435/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180730am?refcode=kme180730am_m&recurring=true")
---
**Despite this, we still have a lot of work to do -- our opponent is leading in the polls and the _Cook Political Report_ still considers our race to be "leaning Republican." [Will you chip in $5 or $10 to help us close the gap?](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542783a/e3b7d3/5c232dc1/2555fba0/1277983435/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180730am?refcode=kme180730am_m&recurring=true")**
We've come too far to get discouraged. Your contributions have allowed us to win support in every county of this district, and prove the naysayers wrong.
We absolutely can win in November -- but with our opponent leading in the polls, your support matters more than ever. [**Can you help us out with a donation of $5 or $10?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542783a/e3b7d3/5c232dc1/2555fba0/1277983435/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180730am?refcode=kme180730am_m&recurring=true")
I'm not relying on Washington special interests like Congressman Ted Budd. **I have something better -- a grassroots network of supporters like you.** I truly am grateful for all of your hard work.
Thank you,
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). subject: Help us reach our goal today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
We are so close to our end of July goal, your contribution could push us over the top.

We are so close to our goal this month!

name: Jacqueline Burns
subject: Re: Jessica Morse for Congress Campaign
body:
Hi Peter,

Jessica herself is going to be in Truckee tomorrow! We are launching a canvass from Truckee Regional park at 4pm - would you be able to join us and meet Jessica in person?

Thanks!

Jackie

On Mon, Jul 23, 2018 at 7:15 PM, Jacqueline Burns <[jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com)> wrote:

> Hi Peter,
>
>
> I just wanted to follow-up. We will be phone banking in Truckee on Wednesday, and canvassing on Saturday and Sunday from 9-12 and again from 12-3pm. Would you be able to join us?
>
>
> We are also having a 100 Days Out celebration this Sunday, July 29, in Truckee - we'd love to see you there! Can you believe it is only 100 days from the election already?
>
>
> Best,
>
>
> Jackie
>
>
>
>
> On Fri, Jul 20, 2018 at 3:37 PM, Jacqueline Burns <[jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com)> wrote:
>
>> Hi Peter,
>>
>
>> I wanted to reach out as I am the new organizer for Jessica's campaign in the Tahoe/Truckee region. This election is going to be critical for our district, and we could really use your help as we ramp up our efforts moving towards November. There are so many different ways you could support our efforts, so I hope to hear back from you! The first opportunity to help would be this weekend - we are doing canvassing in Truckee both Saturday and Sunday - and we will also be phone banking this Wednesday. Would you be able to join us this weekend or on Wednesday?
>>
>
>> Feel free to email, call, or text anytime.
>>
>
>> Best,
>>
>
>> \--
>
>> Jackie Burns
>> Field Organizer
>> (612) 212-2779
>> [jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com)
>
>
>
>
>
> \--
>

> Field Organizer
> (612) 212-2779
> [jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com)

\--

Jackie Burns
Field Organizer
(612) 212-2779
[jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com)

subject: this is big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | | [](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd148/4fbb2af3/7a6863ac/5e8cad2c/144928168/VEsH/ "http://www.rosenfornevada.com/")
---
Team: Just _one_ GOP senator is up for reelection in a state President Trump lost in 2016: Dean Heller from here in Nevada. **And I'm running to flip his seat blue.**
_The Washington Post_ says Nevada is Democrats' best pickup opportunity - but after Donald Trump came to Nevada to raise money, Dean Heller had his best fundraising quarter _ever_.
**A recent poll has us down by one, and we're falling short of our critical end-of-month goal.

That's why a group of generous donors has offered to match all gifts to help us close the gap so we can turn Nevada blue and take back the Senate!

We have to hit our $75,000 end-of-month goal to take back the Senate for Democrats, but time is running out, and we can't win if we miss this goal:**
**[Please, I'm counting on you to donate $5 or more right now- every dollar you can before our critical deadline - and have it DOUBLED to help us win in Nevada so we can take back the Senate for Democrats!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd148/4fbb2af3/7a6863ac/5e8cad2d/144928168/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg0My1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk843-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
The only way we can stand up to Donald Trump, flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate for Democrats is if we hit _every single goal_ from now until Election Day - starting right now.
And now that a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC is planning to spend $11.2 MILLION to defeat us, we cannot afford to miss this rare chance to have every dollar _doubled._
**We have to meet this goal to flip Nevada blue so we can take back the Senate for Democrats - but this match is about to expire, so I'm counting on your immediate donation. [Please, rush $5 or more right now - every dollar will be doubled - to win in Nevada so we can take back the Senate for Democrats!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd148/4fbb2af3/7a6863ac/5e8cad2d/144928168/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg0My1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk843-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Jacky
|
**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126** | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd148/4fbb2af3/7a6863ac/5e8cad2a/144928168/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd148/4fbb2af3/7a6863ac/5e8cad28/144928168/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Team Hawley
subject: McCaskill-Schumer playbook revealed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate[Click here to unsubscribe
body:
Missouri cannot go another six years with a Schumer rubber stamp for a senator. Recently, Politico put out an article revealing Chuck Schumer’s plan to obstruct Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation.

His advice to fellow liberals? **To not tell anyone their decision, and hope that some Republicans join their side.** Funnily enough, that’s exactly what Claire McCaskill is doing.

McCaskill’s prolonged hesitation isn’t a sign she’s taking time to think about her decision. _**It’s a sign that she is doing what Schumer tells her to do.** _

A true independent thinker would be meeting with Kavanaugh. In fact, even some of her fellow Democrats are already planning meetings with him, while McCaskill runs away from anyone who asks.

[Missouri cannot go another six years with a Schumer rubber stamp for a senator. ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c8d3a7e87a024794bfba1d56437a4ee2&_e=eqHKbKe5J4XbVsdGgjHG1YpD9CdngzcHsEHvjN6bxbBG2N1fF_ED7ILTxhb4azqW2cK70QSaaqZEtgRLwSj25mw9h8Cho71LzGwUIA4NYtzJowWYgbFx_SjkCnYFRYayqUu25DS_TPQjnv7WThM1tP5JWwTkxw6SmRf9yNoIxPr0gd_xF6BXSPPwt1yrt1NQdxKWkTgVPmcUO1d-kF4tyekaQayjW1EigveHXCPfnOMIwWOEDq1GMSboqVUhjirl5ojQJUqRgblc7RMlxoN-dW1XtQfBAs5KVusM8CXdqpU%3D)

clean_body: Missouri cannot go another six years with a Schumer rubber stamp for a senator. Recently, Politico put out an article revealing Chuck Schumer’s plan to obstruct Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation. His advice to fellow liberals? To not tell anyone their decision, and hope that some Republicans join their side. Funnily enough, that’s exactly what Claire McCaskill is doing. McCaskill’s prolonged hesitation isn’t a sign she’s taking time to think about her decision. It’s a sign that she is doing what Schumer tells her to do. A true independent thinker would be meeting with Kavanaugh. In fact, even some of her fellow Democrats are already planning meetings with him, while McCaskill runs away from anyone who asks. We talked to Josh, and we’re going to make sure Missourians all over the state know the truth about the McCaskill-Schumer plan. Will you pitch in and help us hit our goal by tomorrow night? We want to spread our message to every Missourian in the state, and we can’t do that without your support. For Missouri,Team Hawley Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

body:

Peter,

President Trump nominated another anti-choice Supreme Court justice.

There's no doubt _Roe v. Wade_ and reproductive rights are in danger.

That's why we've made taking back the Senate one of our biggest priorities.

We need to make sure our 12 Senate candidates win their elections this November so Democrats have approval over Trump's Supreme Court nominee.

**[Donate $3 to help reach our $300,000 End-of-Month goal and elect pro-choice Democratic women to flip the Senate and protect choice.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4efc/24c69fd9/26d1e6854/188568cd/4285526153/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+reach+our+300000+EndofM&utm_campaign=WQEFES78N_digital_email_20180730_EOMSenateText_inact&source=WQEFES78N_digital_email_20180730_EOMSenateText_inact")**

We can turn the Senate blue with _just_ pro-choice Democratic women. Here's how:

First, we have to help re-elect our 10 Senate women. Not only will they be key during the Supreme Court nomination hearings, but they also sit on committees that will hold the Trump administration accountable.

And we need to add two more women to their ranks: Jacky Rosen (NV) and Kyrsten Sinema (AZ). They can flip the two seats Democrats need to take back the Senate.

**Donate $3 to help reach our $300,000 End-of-Month goal and flip the Senate:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-July-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4efc/24c69fd9/26d1e6854/188568ce/4285526153/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitJulyGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFES78N_digital_email_20180730_EOMSenateText_inact&source=WQEFES78N_digital_email_20180730_EOMSenateText_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

subject: Starting our sprint
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Today is a major milestone in my first Senate reelection campaign: we're less than 100 days out to Election Day.

**_[Today is the start of the sprint to Election Day, and I need your support more than ever.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Today+is+the+start+of+the+sprint+to+Elec&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7")_**

Typically this is when we start seeing movement from dark-money groups and national Republicans, but this year they got a head start.

_**The Koch brothers are already running digital ads against me. National Republicans have already contacted over 20 million voters this year. And their campaigns will get more aggressive over the next 100 days.**_
**[DEFEAT THE GOP>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DEFEAT+THE+GOP+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7")** We are not going to get a second chance at this election. There is so much at stake, which is why we have to make every day from now until November 6 count.

**That 's why we are launching my first TV advertisement of the campaign this week.** But my team and I are fighting to reach our $40,000 online fundraising goal before midnight. As of right now, we still need to raise $9,965.

**_[My campaign is powered by people like you, and I need your help to hit this goal and get my first TV ad on the air. Donate here and help me defend my seat and take back the Senate!->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+My+campaign+is+powered+by+people+like+yo&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7")_**

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180730_1_7")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. I'm thankful to have you on my team.

Martin

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: people over polluters, period.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter,

Protecting our environment means protecting the health and
well-being of all Americans. As renewables become cheaper and
cheaper, moving to a green economy also makes good business
sense. America can and must be a leader in fighting climate
change.

But under this Republican Congress, America is lagging
behind, and in some cases even actively sabotaging the fight
against climate change.

We cannot allow the climate disinformation and destruction to
continue.

We’re launching our Climate Defense Fund to fight for
environmental protections and anti-pollution policies RIGHT NOW.
It’s time for the EPA and Congressional Republicans to put people
first, not corporate polluters. Rush your contribution here to
help us start off strong with $5,000 for our fund to take action
immediately. We need to have every dollar in the door before our
end-of-month deadline at MIDNIGHT TOMORROW.
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-climate-defense-fund?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180730_1_1&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

House >>>
( http://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-climate-defense-fund?refcode=DL_EM_FR_WL_180730_1_1&amount=20&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Under Scott Pruitt, the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)
pushed a radically pro-Big Oil agenda, undermining our clean air,
clean water and clean land.

With Andrew Wheeler — a former coal industry lobbyist — now
at the wheel, we can only expect more of the same.

Help us lead the charge to fight pollution and protect our
environment for the good of every American family. With $5,000 to
jump-start our Climate Defense Fund, we can take the fight to the
next level and make lasting change. Chip in here.

As renewables become cheaper and cheaper, moving to a green economy also makes good business sense. America can and must be a leader in fighting climate change. But under this Republican Congress, America is lagging behind, and in some cases even actively sabotaging the fight against climate change. We cannot allow the climate disinformation and destruction to continue. We’re launching our Climate Defense Fund to fight for environmental protections and anti-pollution policies RIGHT NOW. It’s time for the EPA and Congressional Republicans to put people first, not corporate polluters. Rush your contribution here to help us start off strong with $5,000 for our fund to take action immediately. subject: Disturbing Facts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/G2mW4yfR2KXKojYV5q_lDsd6ylMTgZ3ek-OqiRTTBZ4=/EWnL6SXjF80MsBSF_85FKR3I0yV3QodPkdw2mWqt-jI=)
---

Friend,

As Steve's research director, I spend my days looking at the problems Nevadans are facing, along with the records of both candidates and ideas they're proposing.

Steve's record shows he's a tenacious fighter for Nevadans in need. But Attorney General Adam Laxalt's past shows that he's been on the wrong side of too many decisions that would have improved life for Nevadans.

So let me tell you some facts you might not know about Laxalt's record. As Attorney General, Adam Laxalt has:
* **BLOCKED** voter-supported gun safety reforms;
* **CHALLENGED** environmental rules designed to combat climate change;
* **REFUSED** calls to investigate gross mismanagement;
* **ALLOWED** the Trump administration to roll back Nevada's public lands;
* **LOBBIED** the Supreme Court to back draconian anti-abortion laws; &
* **SUED** to stop Nevada workers from receiving fair overtime compensation.

And trust me, friend, those are just some of the ways Laxalt has failed Nevadans.

**[The choice between Adam Laxalt and Steve Sisolak is clear. If you're ready for a candidate who will put Nevadans before special interests, donate to Steve's campaign today >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/G2mW4yfR2KXKojYV5q_lDsd6ylMTgZ3ek-OqiRTTBZ4=/JVu6y7PmnA_VAM-1x5xhy46HYnAZnxc-EPn8AXzDPNU=?gpsid=37_57_2460&refcode=em18_180730_resrch_fnd_gq_act_eom_DG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_resrch_fnd_gq_act_eom_DG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/G2mW4yfR2KXKojYV5q_lDsd6ylMTgZ3ek-OqiRTTBZ4=/JVu6y7PmnA_VAM-1x5xhy46HYnAZnxc-EPn8AXzDPNU=?gpsid=37_57_2460&refcode=em18_180730_resrch_fnd_gq_act_eom_DG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180730_resrch_fnd_gq_act_eom_DG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

Thank you,

Devin Gould
Research Director
Steve Sisolak for Governor

name: Donna Smith
subject: I was in "Sicko" and I'm still fighting for Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
My name is Donna Smith, and for more than ten years, I've been traveling the country fighting for Medicare for All.
#
Friends,
My name is Donna Smith, and for more than ten years, I've been traveling the country fighting for Medicare for All.
I hope you'll give me a few minutes of your time to hear me out today, on the anniversary of Medicare. **My story is important. It's the story of millions of Americans.**
Here's how I see it: I had done everything right. Raising my six kids, working, buying a home for our family--doing what I had been taught to do to get ahead in America. All of that changed in 1999 when I fell terribly ill with what I soon learned was uterine cancer. The health problems for me and my husband, Larry, began to pile up.
By 2003, I was working as a small-town newspaper journalist in Deadwood, South Dakota, driving Larry across state lines for checkups on his coronary artery disease, when my cancer returned. **We lost everything.** Larry and I had to sell our house to pay our medical debts (debts that do not exist in countries with universal health care), got our meals from food banks, and moved into my daughter's basement in Denver.
It was during this time I came to know Michael Moore. I was in his film "Sicko" about our broken, corrupt healthcare system. With the film, I crisscrossed the country, helping to knit together a patchwork movement of activists into a beautiful tapestry. Since then, many voices have become one, proclaiming that every man, woman, and child deserves health care that is guaranteed.
The movement for Medicare for All is growing and we are so close to the finish line. I'm excited to share with you that Our Revolution and Progressive Democrats of America will be partnering to make our shared dream of Medicare for All a reality. Together with more than 600 local groups and chapters who are working together to expand our reach, relationships, and local presence to organize all across this country.
**Will you make a Medicare anniversary gift to support the growing movement for Medicare for All?**
**Even just a few bucks goes a long way fighting for Medicare for All and bringing new people into our movement who can champion this policy alongside us:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9da/bed43eb/7e7a04b1/75fd67bf/3571708708/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiMTgwNzMwLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=180730-full")**
I have never looked at the burden of ill health as mine alone; 28 million Americans are uninsured right now; 18,000 will die every year for lack of care.
And even more like me, the 41 million who are underinsured and cannot afford the out-of-pocket costs of a health crisis, might as well be uninsured too. Access to health care means very little if people cannot afford it.
As one person suffers due to the inadequacy of our health care system, we all suffer. I may have to use a walker and wear an oxygen tube to keep fighting, but I'm not going to let it slow me down. And I know that if I can keep pushing for Medicare for All, then you can too.
**[The work that we are doing is so incredibly important, and your $7 contribution helps us continue to organize communities across our country and build on the 600 combined local groups and chapters with whom we are already organizing. If you can, please pitch in today.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9da/bed43eb/7e7a04b1/75fd67bf/3571708708/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiMTgwNzMwLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=180730-full")**
Change is on the horizon. A strong progressive movement is organizing across the country, building solidarity and tackling intersectional issues with a fervor that gives me the strength to still yell and rally for what I believe in.
This is life or death for me and so many of you, and the people you love. The movement for Medicare for All is about our human decency and the moral character of this nation. I know that with your participation, the goodness within us will come to the fore, and we can live in a nation where all are cared for in the manner that each human being deserves.
Thank you for reading. I hope my story can be a bit of inspiration, like how you all have inspired me.
In solidarity,
Donna Smith
**[FUND MEDICARE FOR ALL](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9da/bed43eb/7e7a04b1/75fd67bf/3571708708/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiMTgwNzMwLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=180730-full")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9da/bed43eb/7e7a04b1/75fd67be/3571708708/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9da/bed43eb/7e7a04b1/75fd67b9/3571708708/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9da/bed43eb/7e7a04b1/75fd67b8/3571708708/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9da/bed43eb/7e7a04b1/75fd67bb/3571708708/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Steve Schultz
subject: My wife
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
You've probably heard by now, the GOP has been going after Debbie a lot this summer. Her five opponents are pulling out all the stops and a Koch-linked group has already come after her.
|
---
| | You've probably heard by now, the GOP has been going after Debbie a lot this summer. Her five opponents are pulling out all the stops and a Koch-linked group has already come after her. But Debbie tries not to pay attention to attacks. She calls it "gator skin" -- thick and impenetrable by attacks from the other side. Debbie has a job to do: Protect Florida families. That's what she focuses on, no matter what attacks come. **But it's not a job she can do by herself.** These attacks can work if they go unanswered. [**It's up to you to respond with grassroots power.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f1f/622b7b5b/1c082769/307b9a67/2226621035/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726d?refcode=dwse180726d_m&recurring=true&amount=5") [**We only have another 30 hours to reach our $25,000 July goal and go into Primary Month in the strongest possible position. Don't let us miss this goal. Rush in your contribution before time runs out.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f1f/622b7b5b/1c082769/307b9a67/2226621035/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726d?refcode=dwse180726d_m&recurring=true&amount=5") No one I know works harder than Debbie. It's what makes her so effective in Congress. I hope you'll work just as hard to support her. | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f1f/622b7b5b/1c082769/307b9a67/2226621035/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726d?refcode=dwse180726d_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
Thank you.
Steve Schultz

|

name: Tori Taylor
subject: 30 more hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | I'm sure you're ready to relax after a Monday back at work, so I'll keep this quick team. Our July deadline is in only 30 hours. When I see Kathy on Wednesday, I need to be able to tell her that we reached our goal. But right now, we're still $1,652 short. With polls of our race neck-and-neck, we simply can't afford to miss goals like this. [**Will you rush in $5, $10, or match our average donation of $21.59 to help us close the gap?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542783b/e3b7d3/5c2a846a/2555fbac/1250145200/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180730pm?refcode=kme180730pm_m&recurring=true&amount=21.59") Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our campaign has grown so much over the last few months. We have built a movement of over 30,000 grassroots supporters and volunteers. We've taken a race that many thought a longshot and turned it into one of the most competitive House races in the country. And we made history becoming the biggest grassroots Democratic campaign in North Carolina's 13th District **_ever._** After all our hard work and history made, I can't bare the thought of having to tell Kathy we missed our goal. [**Can you pitch in our average online donation of $21.59 to help us keep climbing?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542783b/e3b7d3/5c2a846a/2555fbac/1250145200/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180730pm?refcode=kme180730pm_m&recurring=true&amount=21.59") As always, everyone at Team Kathy is so grateful for your support. Together, we'll win this. Thank you, Tori Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Property Tax Relief
body:
We saved Vermonters $71 Million in Projected Property Tax Hikes |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7e8053cedf&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b3458c6ce2&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2fc8e0a8b7&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e2d7e83473&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5d5a679032&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5d5a679032&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Friend,
---
| Before I became Governor, it was common practice to allow the Education Fund to manage us. **But I have made it clear we need a new approach, and that means we have to look at cost containment as well as how we pay for education.** So instead of letting the Education Fund manage us, and having the Legislature increase rates to cover the costs, I fought to keep rates level, because Vermonters needed a break. **If we had done nothing, property taxes would have increased by more than $70 million dollars over the last two years.** That wasn’t acceptable to me, because Vermonters cannot afford to pay more. **Last year I successfully advocated for level statewide property tax rates for both residential and non-residential payers. This year, we successfully delivered a second consecutive year of level statewide rates for residential payers**. And, by holding the line and vetoing two budgets, I cut the rate increases for non-residential payers by 50% -- much to the Legislative Majority’s displeasure. **In total, through the combination of spending restraint at the local level and my veto pen, Vermont has avoided about $71 million in forecasted property tax rate increases.** But this conversation isn’t over. I have assured members of the Legislature this will continue next session. We cannot ignore the crisis of affordability.
> | | | | _**To help us continue this progress, don’t forget to vote in the upcoming Republican Primary on, or before, August 14th. I’d be honored to have your support! **_
> ---
Sincerely,

Phil Scott

**P.S.** \- If your property taxes went up, it was due to factors like your town’s grand list growth or local decisions on education funding. The only lever controlled by the state is the property tax rate which the legislature sets.

| [Request an Absentee Ballot Here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7f9bfb361f&e=19cebfe173 "Request an Absentee Ballot Here")
---

---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: The final stop on the Comeback Cities Tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
If this tour showed us anything, it is that while Washington remains mired in its usual partisan fights, communities across the country -- especially in the Midwest -- are finding new and innovative w | |
---
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc4380/2257475525/VEsH/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180723_30&utm_campaign=230718_email&utm_source=TR4C&utm_medium=email&utm_content=1") Folks, After our visits to Detroit and Flint, Michigan we got back on the bus and headed towards our third and final stop: South Bend, Indiana. From the moment we stepped foot off the bus it was clear that South Bend was on the move. We had the privilege of having breakfast with Mayor Pete Buttigieg (or as he prefers, simply "Mayor Pete") before he accompanied us on a tour of their 1.3 million-square-foot former Studebaker plant that was being transformed into a mixed-use technology campus. The idea of this space is to serve as an incubator for all manner of tech and business ventures to thrive and grow. We were truly impressed with what we saw, and with Mayor Pete's vision and leadership. [Please watch and share the third and final part of the Comeback Cities Tour >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc4383/2257475525/VEsE/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180730_30&utm_campaign=300718_email&utm_source=TR4C&utm_medium=email&utm_content=2+-+Please+watch+and+share+the+third+and+fin") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc4382/2257475525/VEsF/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180730_30&utm_campaign=300718_email&utm_source=TR4C&utm_medium=email&utm_content=3") Our country faces an ever-growing number of challenges in the 21st century, but all too often our political dialogue doesn't even begin to scratch the surface. **If this tour showed us anything, it is that while Washington remains mired in its usual partisan fights, communities across the country -- especially in the Midwest -- are finding new and innovative ways to forge ahead.** [The goal of the Comeback Cities Tour was simple: Bring in talented Venture Capital leaders to meet with local businesses, elected officials, and incubators to learn about the startup activity and investment opportunities right in our backyard.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc4385/2257475525/VEsC/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180730_30&utm_campaign=300718_email&utm_source=TR4C&utm_medium=email&utm_content=4+-+The+goal+of+the+Comeback+Cities+Tour+was") I believe there is great opportunity for investment in "comeback cities" like Akron, Youngstown, Flint, Detroit, and South Bend. It's a win-win: lower costs for companies, and more jobs and opportunity for folks in the Heartland. This was just the beginning, and the conversation for how to include every region of our country in the new American economy continues. Thanks for following along. \-- Tim [DONATE ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc4384/2257475525/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timryan_comebackcities?refcode=em20180730_30&refcode2=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+rarr&utm_campaign=em20180739_30&source=em20180739_30")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc4387/2257475525/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-+Receive+Fewer+Emails&utm_campaign=em20180739_30&source=em20180739_30") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc4386/2257475525/VEsB/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-++Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em20180739_30&source=em20180739_30")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc4389/2257475525/VEsO/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=em20180739_30&source=em20180739_30") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc4388/2257475525/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=em20180739_30&source=em20180739_30")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc438b/2257475525/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=10+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=em20180739_30&source=em20180739_30") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc438a/2257475525/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=11+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em20180739_30&source=em20180739_30"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9210/5486deaa/294519d0/dcc438d/2257475525/VEsHBw/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=12+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em20180739_30&source=em20180739_30") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Austin has a big deadline coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hello Friend, Austin told me he’s going to shoot you a very important an email tomorrow so I am just giving you a heads up. Tomorrow is not only the last day of the month but it also marks exactly ONE WEEK until the August primary. By midnight tomorrow, we need to find roughly another 319 donors to help fund our last minute voter outreach efforts. You saw our campaign update this morning, right? We have generated so much media in the last seven days. We are reaching THOUSANDS of primary voters on the phones and by knocking on their doors every day. We can win this election. But Austin needs your help. Can you donate to the campaign one last time before the primary? name: Cate Domino, bobcasey.com
subject: Trump is coming -- fight back before the midnight deadline:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e601d/51dbcc2a/183e0628/3a69d39/3699575234/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Let's talk about Vice President Pence's speech last week. While he was in Philadelphia, he attacked Bob for protecting the Affordable Care Act, voting against the GOP's corporate tax cut and calling out the corrupt bargain with the special interests that selected this Supreme Court nominee. And on Thursday, President Trump is coming to Pennsylvania to campaign for Congressman Lou Barletta, a Trump loyalist and Bob's opponent in this Senate race. Long story short, this administration is not happy that Bob has consistently stood up for the middle class, and now they're investing their time and money into flipping this seat.

We didn't meet our $15,000 match goal before the deadline on Saturday, but thankfully, our match donors are extending the deadline to midnight tonight. **_[We need to take advantage of this, because if we don't, the consequences could be devastating. Can you chip in $5 (becomes $10) or more before midnight?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

This is an awesome opportunity, really, and we can't miss it, especially now that the president himself is getting involved. Trump's already poured thousands of dollars into radio ads promoting his rally, and his campaign plans to donate to Barletta's campaign fund. This administration definitely has its sights set on PA, so we can't afford to fall behind.

**_[That's why we have to take advantage of this match opportunity: Republican money is flowing into Pennsylvania this year, so we have to maximize every possible dollar of grassroots support. Can you chip in $5 to fight back today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Ever since Bob called out the president's corrupt bargain with corporate special interests over this Supreme Court nomination, they've really stepped up their attacks. President Trump himself smeared Bob on Twitter and attacked him on stage at an NRA rally for refusing to support some of the most divisive pieces of the Trump agenda, and you'd better believe that Trump will attack Bob on stage this week.

**It's never been more important to make sure that this campaign has the resources it needs to fight back. What can you give to help us meet our $15,000 match goal?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 (Becomes $50)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 (Becomes $100)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thanks,

Cate

Cate Domino
Digital Director
Bob Casey for Senate

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180730_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

We have less than one hundred days until Election Day, Friend.

We are now less than one hundred days to Election Day. This is getting pretty serious, Friend,

AND, our end-of-month fundraising deadline is just over twenty-four hours away. After crunching some numbers, we still need about $5,000 to reach our goal.

**Time is running out. With just ninety-nine days to go, we can't afford to fall short of our fundraising goal before tomorrow's deadline. [**We need another $5,827 before tomorrow's deadline. name: Samantha Avila
subject: This Wednesday and Upcoming events!
body:
|
---
N/A -- Good afternoon, This Wednesday is our weekly CallHub meeting, where we will be making phone calls and reaching out to voters from 6:00 to 7:30 P.M. at our Campaign Headquarters (2020 S. McClintock Rd, Suite 104, Tempe, AZ 85282). If you are unable to come in, you can also join us remotely from home! Please remember to bring your phone and laptop/tablet! If you need help setting up, feel free to reach out to [sam@kelliward.com](mailto:sam@kelliward.com) or (623) 205-8541. **_Also, here are some upcoming events that need amazing volunteers:_** **LD 15 Monthly Meeting (Need 2 volunteers)
** Wednesday, August 1 6:30 – 8:30pm Arizona Agribusiness & Equine[ 3775 E Union Hills Dr, Phoenix, AZ 85032, USA](https://www.wardforarizona.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmaps.google.com%2F%3Fcid%3D2964290266284130754&e=fa6f97f500b2dd17f5e159d2d0c5907d&utm_source=kelliward&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=events_weekaug&n=1) More info about upcoming events will be send out!
